title: Geepas Electric Fly Killer & Bug Zapper | Powerful UV Light Indoor Insect Trap for Flies, Mosquitoes, Wasps | 50M² Coverage | Odourless & Low Noise | Plug-in Eco-Friendly Pest Control 20W
bullet_points: ✅ POWERFUL 20W UV FLY ZAPPER – This high-performance bug zapper features 2 x 10W UV tubes that effectively attract and eliminate flies, mosquitoes, wasps, and other flying insects within seconds. Ideal for home, kitchen, office & restaurants.

✅ WIDE 50M² COVERAGE & REPLACEABLE BULBS – The ultraviolet light attracts insects from up to 50M² away, ensuring maximum pest control. The replaceable UV tubes provide long-term performance, keeping your space insect-free.
✅ CHEMICAL-FREE & ODOURLESS INSECT CONTROL –This eco-friendly fly killer operates without chemicals, making it safe for homes with children, pets, and allergy sufferers.

✅ WALL-MOUNTABLE OR FREE-STANDING DESIGN – Designed for versatile use, this lightweight bug zapper can be hung on a wall (chain included) or placed on a flat surface, providing flexible positioning for maximum effectiveness.

✅ SAFE & EASY TO CLEAN WITH REMOVABLE TRAY – The protective safety grid prevents accidental contact, while the removable and washable insect collection tray ensures hassle-free cleaning and maintenance. The electric grid is self-cleaning for added convenience.

✅ DURABLE, LOW-NOISE & ENERGY-EFFICIENT – Featuring a sturdy, lightweight design, this low-noise insect zapper operates quietly, making it ideal for bedrooms, offices, and restaurants. The energy-saving UV tubes ensure efficient performance with minimal power consumption.
